summary.original: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
summary.zhCN: 创建新技能、修改和改进现有技能，并衡量技能表现。适用于用户想从零创建技能、编辑或优化现有技能、运行 eval 测试技能、通过方差分析对技能表现进行 benchmark，或优化技能 description 以提高触发准确度的场景。

description.original: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 创建新技能、修改和改进现有技能，并衡量技能表现。适用于用户想从零创建技能、编辑或优化现有技能、运行 eval 测试技能、通过方差分析对技能表现进行 benchmark，或优化技能 description 以提高触发准确度的场景。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，提供章节导航、全文搜索和沙箱化源文件渲染；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA 65b3a402dbd09b8e83f9d637c6b553875189085c.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier Apache-2.0 recorded from skills/skill-creator/LICENSE.txt. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备面向具体任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有边界的用户目标和上下文，对已固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的情况下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。

features: Skill 创建或改进任务 with two skill-specific task examples
触发场景与评测样本 and bounded private context input
Skill 创建评测包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: Skill 创建或改进任务 input
触发场景与评测样本 panel
Skill 创建评测包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-skill-creator: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-skill-creator: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-skill-creator: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-skill-creator] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-skill-creator; result=passed
skill-skill-creator: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
